title: Fixing broken link for container-registries.conf
body:
The link to the container-registries.conf man page was a little off - this fixes it.

This patch was originaly submitted by Kris Nova <kris@nivenly.com>
I am signing it to get it merged.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit f934b4a has been approved by `rhatdan`

@rhatdan greet test buttons, but it doesn't seem to have merged auto-magically as I'd expect?
I think humu is waiting on a different PR to merge.
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
